name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Watergel Ampoule Sheet Mask 25ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Watergel Ampoule Sheet Mask (25ml) is a refreshing gel-type mask designed to deliver deep hydration and instant soothing relief to tired or sensitive skin. Infused with 51% Centella Asiatica Extract, it calms redness, strengthens the skin barrier, and protects against environmental stressors. The soft gel sheet, made from natural Tencel and Bamboo fibres, fits comfortably to ensure maximum absorption of its nutrient-rich ampoule.Formulated with five types of multi-molecular Hyaluronic Acid, it replenishes moisture at every layer of the skin, while Condensed Oil and Corn Mint Oil provide a cooling, revitalising sensation. The result is a calm, dewy, and balanced complexion after just one use. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After cleansing, apply toner to prepare the skin. Remove the mask from the pouch and apply evenly over the face, avoiding the eye and mouth areas. Leave on for 10-20 minutes, then remove. Gently pat any remaining ampoule into the skin until absorbed.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizing Fresh Ampoule 100ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizing Fresh Ampoule (100ml) is a refreshing pore toner that has a watery texture that is low in oil to deliver a burst of moisture without leaving a sticky finish. This non-comedogenic serum reduces pore size, volume, depth, and total area. High-purity Himalayan Pink Salt clears impurities and prevents pore enlargement while the Peptide-9 Complex supports collagen and elastin production, improving skin elasticity and firmness to tighten pores. Enriched with over 50% of high-purity Madagascan Centella Asiatica Extract, it rapidly soothes sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: Dispense an appropriate amount and apply evenly to the skin. Gently pat for better absorption.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Probio-Cica Nourishing Sheet Mask 23ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Probio-Cica Nourishing Sheet Mask (23ml) is a deeply hydrating and restorative mask formulated to strengthen and revitalise the skin. Enriched with Fermented Madagascan Centella Asiatica, Ceramides, and a 9-Peptide Complex, it delivers intensive nourishment while helping to improve elasticity and firmness. The fermented Centella enhances absorption and soothes irritation, supporting the skin's natural recovery process and leaving it soft, supple, and resilient.The rich, milky essence provides long-lasting moisture without heaviness, while Ceramides lock in hydration and reinforce the skin barrier. The ultra-soft sheet conforms comfortably to the face, ensuring even distribution of active ingredients for a radiant, healthy-looking finish. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, apply the sheet evenly across the face. Leave on for 10-20 minutes. Remove and gently tap the remaining essence into the skin until absorbed.

name: Medicube Red Succinic Acid Peeling Pads x70
description: Medicube Red Succinic Acid Peeling Pads (70 Pads) are exfoliating toner pads designed to help clarify, refine and rebalance breakout-prone or stressed skin. They provide a targeted peeling effect that supports clearer pores and smoother texture while remaining suitable for regular use.The multi-acid formula combines Succinic Acid, Salicylic Acid (BHA) and Glycolic Acid (AHA) to lift dead skin cells, dissolve congestion and improve overall tone. Niacinamide helps brighten and even the complexion, while Panthenol works to calm visible redness and support the skin barrier. Formulated within a skin-friendly pH range of 3.5 to 5.5, the pads feel lightweight and refreshing on the skin without stickiness. Dermatologist-tested and non-comedogenic, they are free from artificial colours and fragrances and suitable for teens and adults managing persistent breakouts. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Cleanse the skin thoroughly. Gently wipe a pad across the face, neck or other desired areas. Follow with moisturiser and the rest of your skincare routine.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremising Clarifying Sheet Mask 23ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremising Clarifying Sheet Mask (23ml) is a purifying and soothing sheet mask designed to refine pores and balance the skin. Formulated with Centella Asiatica Extract, Adenosine, and plant-based Collagen, it delivers deep hydration while calming irritation and supporting skin recovery. Himalayan Pink Salt and Succinic Acid help draw out impurities, regulate excess sebum, and improve elasticity, promoting a smoother, clearer complexion.Enriched with gentle exfoliating acids including AHA, PHA, BHA, and LHA, this mask removes dead skin cells to refine texture without irritation. Its lightweight, fast-absorbing essence leaves the skin refreshed and balanced, while the soft plant-based sheet ensures a comfortable fit. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After toning, apply the sheet evenly to the face. Leave on for 10-20 minutes. Remove and gently tap the remaining essence into the skin for better absorption.

name: Arencia Fresh Green Mochi Cleanser 120g
description: Arencia Fresh Green Mochi Cleanser (120g) is a hydrating facial cleanser with a soft, mochi-like texture that melts into the skin to gently remove face and eye makeup, dirt and impurities without compromising the skin's moisture balance.Enriched with brightening Rice Water and calming extracts of Witch Hazel and Hyssop, it soothes, revitalises and protects against dryness, irritation and tightness. The formula offers gentle exfoliation and sebum control using natural ingredients, leaving a smooth, glossy finish without stripping the skin. Crafted using a unique kneading process that preserves essential vitamins and minerals, this daily-use cleanser supports the skin barrier and promotes a calm, refreshed and radiant complexion. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Take an appropriate amount. Add water to lather. Gently massage onto skin. Rinse off with lukewarm water.

name: Medicube PDRN Booster Gel 300ml
description: Medicube PDRN Booster Gel (300ml) is a rejuvenating gel designed to deliver deep hydration and improve skin elasticity. Formulated with Salmon PDRN, known for its skin-repairing and moisturising properties, this lightweight gel soothes, lifts and restores the skin's natural glow. A complex of seven peptides strengthens the skin barrier, enhances firmness and supports a more youthful, radiant complexion over time. Ideal for those looking to address early signs of ageing, the non-sticky formula absorbs effortlessly, making it perfect for daily use on all skin types, including sensitive skin. Dermatologist-tested, it calms irritation, replenishes moisture and promotes long-term skin health with consistent use. Cruelty-free. Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, apply a generous amount to the face and neck. Massage gently in circular motions until fully absorbed. Follow with a moisturiser or sunscreen for best results.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Hydrating Sheet Mask 23ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Hydrating Sheet Mask (23ml) is an intensely moisturising mask designed to soothe and replenish dehydrated or sensitive skin. Formulated with Madagascan Centella Asiatica Extract and eight types of Hyaluronic Acid, it delivers multi-layer hydration while calming irritation and improving skin elasticity. Its lightweight, water-based essence absorbs quickly, leaving a refreshed, non-sticky finish that restores balance and radiance. Enriched with Ceramide NP, Squalane, and Adenosine, this mask strengthens the skin barrier and locks in moisture, helping to prevent dryness and maintain a smooth, supple texture. Additional actives such as Glyceryl Glucoside and Aqua Xylitol form a protective moisture film, supporting long-lasting hydration and comfort. Clinically tested for sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, apply the sheet evenly across the face. Leave on for 10-20 minutes. Remove and gently tap the remaining essence into the skin to aid absorption.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Probio-Cica Intensive Ampoule 95ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Probio-Cica Intensive Ampoule (95ml) has been formulated with fermented Centella and Ceramides to deliver deep hydration, enhance firmness, and leave the skin with a healthy glow. Designed to provide soothing relief, it helps to tighten pores while reinforcing the skin barrier for lasting moisture and protection.Fermented Madagascan Centella and TECA maximise calming effects, while a carefully balanced blend of Ceramide, Phytosterol, and fatty acids in a golden 3:1:1 ratio effectively locks in hydration. The high-concentration formula absorbs effortlessly, leaving a silky, radiant finish without any residue or stickiness. Perfect for dry, normal, and combination skin, this ampoule nourishes and strengthens for a smoother, healthier complexion. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply an appropriate amount on the skin. Pat to encourage absorption.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Water-Fit Sun Serum PA++++ SPF50+ 100ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Water-Fit Sun Serum PA++++ SPF50+ (100ml) is a high-protection chemical sunscreen formulated with Hyaluronic Acids, Centella Asiatica, and a soothing Baby Green Complex to defend and hydrate the skin simultaneously. Its ultra-lightweight, serum-like texture glides on effortlessly, providing a breathable, dewy finish without any white cast. Delivering the comfort of a moisturiser, it absorbs quickly while maintaining optimal hydration throughout the day.Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, this multi-functional formula offers brightening, anti-wrinkle, and UV-protective benefits. The reef-safe blend is free from marine-harmful ingredients, while 7 types of Sprout Extracts within the Baby Greens Complex calm and nourish stressed skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply evenly to areas exposed to UV rays as the final step in your skincare routine. Gently pat for enhanced absorption.

name: D'Alba White Truffle First Spray Serum 50ml
description: D'Alba White Truffle First Spray Serum (100ml) is a multi-functional mist, serum and setting spray which is suitable for integration into each step in your skincare and makeup routine. The double-layer serum has been enriched with Italian White Truffle, Niacinamide and Chia Seed Extract to hydrate the skin, enhance elasticity and leave a radiant glow.The signature key ingredient Trufferol comprises richly antioxidant Premium White Truffles carefully sourced from Piedmont in Italy which have been infused with Tocopherol (Vitamin E) to create an effect 6 times more effective than the renowned anti-inflammatory and antioxidant active Propolis. Free from surfactants, the double layering of the serum and oil effectively moisturises the skin whilst an oil layer comprising Avocado Oil, Sunflower Seed Oil and other plant-based oils locks in moisture and radiance. Providing ease of use, the misting spray nozzle facilitates pleasantly lightweight application on the skin. Dermatologically tested, and hypoallergenic. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Key Benefits: Anti-ageing. Improves moisture levels. Infuses ultra-hydration. Enhances elasticity. Light finish. Antioxidant protection. All-in-one care. Directions of use: For skincare - shake and spritz as much as you please right after cleansing to add moisture and nutrients to your skin. Can be used in between any step of your skincare. Before/after makeup - shake and spritz before your makeup to prep your skin and after your makeup to set it and add the glow.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Glow Sheet Mask 25ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Glow Mask (25ml) is a radiance-enhancing sheet mask designed to soothe, even out skin tone, and restore a healthy glow. Infused with Centella Asiatica Extract, it calms sensitivity and supports the skin barrier, while Niacinamide, Tranexamic Acid, and MadeWhite™ work together to reduce pigmentation and promote a more luminous complexion. The lightweight essence, enriched with Madagascan Cica Extract, Vitamin C derivatives, BHA, and PHA, gently exfoliates and hydrates to reveal smoother, brighter skin. Its soft, flexible sheet adheres comfortably to the face, ensuring optimal absorption of the active ingredients. After each use, skin feels refreshed, balanced, and visibly more radiant. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, remove the mask from its packaging. Apply evenly to the face, adjusting around the eyes and nose. Leave on for 10-20 minutes. Remove and gently pat in the remaining essence until absorbed. Follow with your usual serum or moisturiser.

name: Biodance Radiant Vita Niacinamide Real Deep Mask 4 x 34g
description: Biodance Radiant Vita Niacinamide Real Deep Mask (4 x 34g) is a targeted facial sheet mask designed to visibly brighten dull, uneven skin while addressing dark spots and hyperpigmentation. Powered by Niacinamide and high-purity Glutathione, it helps refine melasma and discolouration to promote a more even, luminous complexion. The addition of Pineapple Water gently exfoliates dead skin cells without irritation, refreshing tired, lacklustre skin. A nourishing blend of vitamins soothes and calms, supporting improved tone and texture in a single step. Deep hydration comes from Oligo Hyaluronic Acid, while low-molecular weight Collagen Peptides and Galactomyces help to firm, moisturise and refine pores. Hypoallergenic and free from 19 common irritants, this gentle mask is safe even for sensitive or reactive skin types. Directions of use: Overnight - apply at the end of your evening skincare routine and leave on overnight. Remove the next morning. Daytime - after toner or serum, apply the mask and leave on for 3-4 hours or until it turns transparent. Pro Tip - reapply the eye and mouth sections of the mask to areas like the nose, under eyes or neck for added hydration and firming.

name: Haruharu Wonder Centella Phyto & 5 Peptide Concentrate Cream 30ml
description: Haruharu Wonder Centella Phyto & 5 Peptide Concentrate Cream (30ml) is a multifunctional facial cream designed to tackle various skin concerns with one dynamic formulation. This vegan cream features a robust 5 Peptide Complex to fight signs of ageing, improve skin firmness, and reduce fine lines and wrinkles while strengthening the skin barrier. Formulated with Hydrolysed Soy Protein and Adenosine, it delivers deep hydration and enhances elasticity. Squalene and Caffeine illuminate and depuff, sealing in moisture for a luminous look. Enhanced with 150ppm of Cica Extract, the cream calms and moisturises, ensuring a smooth and well-nourished complexion. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: Apply and spread gently over the skin as the final step of your skincare routine, avoiding eyes and mouth. Tap lightly for absorption.

name: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 300 50ml
description: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 300 (50ml) is a translucent white physical derma delivery system containing circa 237,500 natural micro-needles which rejuvenates the skin by accelerating skin cell turnover to provide smoother, healthier skin.This spreadable MTS treatment contains VT's proprietary Cica Reedle and Cicahyalon ingredients containing Silica, Centella Asiatica Extract, low molecular Triple Hyaluronic Acid, Centella 4X Complex and Green Propolis Extract to exfoliate, treat acne, optimise hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. These key active ingredients are activated by the micro-needles so that they permeate the deeper layers of the skin, enhancing the condition of sensitive skin, promoting skin regeneration and restoring overall skin health. Whilst having a gentle action on the skin, this treatment offers dual functionality, effectively brightening whilst minimising the appearance of wrinkles. Cruelty-free.Directions of use:For skin care in the evening, take an appropriate amount on a clean face and apply it gently with your fingers.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cream: Retinal Liposome + Fermented Rice 50ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cream: Retinal Liposome + Fermented Rice (50ml) is a nourishing anti-ageing treatment that helps improve elasticity, brightness and overall skin texture with minimal irritation.Enriched with 1% Retinal Liposome and Lactobacillus/Rice Ferment, it supports cell renewal while promoting a more radiant, youthful-looking complexion. Bakuchiol, Vitamins C and E, and a 3-Peptide Complex work together to encourage collagen production, targeting fine lines and wrinkles for smoother, firmer skin. The formula is further boosted with five herbal root extracts that deliver antioxidant protection, alongside Lactobacillus/Panax Ginseng Root Ferment Filtrate to soothe and comfort. With a silky, creamy texture that absorbs instantly, it provides lasting hydration without stickiness, leaving skin soft, supple and refreshed. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, apply a moderate amount evenly to the skin. Gently pat for better absorption.

name: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 2-Step Mask 25g
description: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 2-Step Mask (25g) includes a sachet of VT Mild Reedle Shot 700 together with a synergising sheet mask to optimise the efficacy of the key active ingredients and facilitate deep skin recovery. VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 is a translucent white physical derma delivery system containing circa 570,000 natural micro-needles which rejuvenate the skin by accelerating skin cell turnover to provide smoother, healthier skin. This spreadable laser treatment contains VT's proprietary Cica Reedle and Cicahyalon ingredients containing Silica, Centella Asiatica Extract, low molecular Triple Hyaluronic Acid, Centella 4X Complex and Green Propolis Extract to exfoliate, treat acne, optimise hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. These key active ingredients are activated by the micro-needles so that they permeate the deeper layers of the skin, enhancing the condition of sensitive skin, promoting skin regeneration and restoring overall skin health. Whilst having a gentle action on the skin, this treatment offers a dual functionality, effectively brightening whilst minimising the appearance of wrinkles. Kit Contains: 1 x VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 (1.5g). 1 x VT Cosmetics Reedle Synergy Sheet Mask. Directions of use: For skin care in the evening, take an appropriate amount on a clean face and apply it gently with your fingers. Apply sheet mask immediately over face and leave to activate for 20 to 30 minutes.

name: Haruharu Wonder Black Rice 5 Ceramide Barrier Moisturising Cream 50ml
description: Haruharu Wonder Black Rice 5 Ceramide Barrier Moisturising Cream (50ml) is an advanced moisturiser designed to deliver long-lasting hydration while strengthening the skin barrier. Its rich yet balanced texture absorbs smoothly, providing daily comfort and care for even sensitive skin.Formulated with Capsule Technology, the cream contains Ceramide-filled capsules that burst upon application for fast, deep moisture delivery. A 5 Ceramide Complex (NP, NS, AP, EOS and EOP) helps reinforce the barrier and improve resilience, while Fermented Black Rice Extract and Upcycled Black Rice Jigemi (Lees) Extract provide antioxidant protection and support a more even skin tone. Allantoin and Tocopherol (Vitamin E) help soothe irritation, improve elasticity and refine skin texture. With continued use, skin appears smoother, firmer and more radiant, with clinically proven improvements in moisture levels and barrier strength. The formula is free from artificial fragrance, GMOs, phthalates, sulphates, silicones, mineral oil, drying alcohol and synthetic dyes. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After toner and essence or serum, apply an appropriate amount to the face and neck. Gently massage into the skin to burst the capsules and aid absorption. Use morning and evening, focusing on areas prone to dryness.

name: CosRx Advanced Snail Mucin Glass Glow Hydrogel Sheet Mask 34g
description: CosRx Advanced Snail Mucin Glass Glow Hydrogel Mask (34g) is a premium hydrogel mask infused with 25% Snail Secretion Filtrate, designed to deliver intense hydration and visible skin renewal. As the mask gradually turns transparent during wear, it penetrates deeply into the skin, soothing irritation, restoring firmness, and reducing the appearance of fine lines for a plumper, more radiant complexion.Enriched with Collagen, it helps to refine texture, minimise the look of pores, and even out skin tone, leaving skin luminous, supple, and refreshed. Ideal for tired or dehydrated complexions in need of instant revival, this mask provides an all-in-one treatment to hydrate, repair, and enhance elasticity for a long-lasting glow and softness. Cruelty-free.Directions of use: After cleansing, apply toner or serum. Open the pouch, remove the films, and place the mask on the face. Leave for 2-3 hours or until the mask turns transparent. Remove and gently massage the remaining essence into the skin.

name: Medicube Zero Pore One Day Cream 50ml
description: Medicube Zero Pore One Day Cream (50ml) is a lightweight, fast-absorbing cream which has been formulated with a powerful blend of skin-loving ingredients including Panthenol, Niacinamide and Salicylic Acid to deliver hydration, exfoliation and anti-ageing benefits in just one step.Designed to target clogged pores, excess sebum and uneven texture, this moisturiser is suitable for all skin types, transforming dull, uneven skin into a refreshed, glowing complexion with visibly reduced pores. Ideal for all skin types especially for oily and combination skin. Cruelty-free.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, dispense a small amount of cream and apply onto your face. Gently pat for better absorption.

name: CosRx Skin Barrier Moisturising Cream 450ml
description: CosRx Skin Barrier Moisturising Cream (450ml) is a rich yet lightweight cream for the face and body that delivers long-lasting hydration and comfort. With a cloud-like texture, it provides up to 100 hours of moisture while reinforcing the skin barrier.Infused with a 5-Ceramide Complex, essential lipids and multi-molecular Hyaluronic Acid, it deeply nourishes and soothes dry or sensitive skin without greasiness. Ideal for normal to dry or reactive skin, it helps relieve post-shower tightness and rough patches, leaving skin soft, smooth and resilient from head to toe. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply a generous amount to dry areas such as arms, legs, elbows or hands. Massage gently until fully absorbed. For extra hydration, reapply to particularly dry or rough patches.

name: Numbuzin No. 9 NAD+ PDRN Glow Boosting Toner 150ml
description: Numbuzin No. 9 NAD PDRN Glow Boosting Toner (150ml) has a formula enriched with NAD+, 1000ppm of pure Salmon PDRN, and 50 powerful peptides to deliver a radiant transformation.Designed to revitalise and strengthen your skin, it enhances elasticity while delivering essence-level nourishment for a plump, youthful complexion. The toner's natural violet, shimmery hue comes from Vitamin B12 and Ceramides, creating an aurora-like, luminous finish that illuminates your skin from within. Gentle and non-comedogenic, this formula is suitable for sensitive skin, leaving you with a dewy, glass-skin glow that radiates health and vitality.Directions of use:Gently shake the toner and apply a moderate amount onto the skin while lightly patting your skin to enhance absorption.

name: Biodance Rejuvenating Caviar PDRN Real Deep Mask 4 x 34g
description: Biodance Rejuvenating Caviar PDRN Real Deep Mask (4 x 34g) is an intensive hydrogel sheet mask designed to deliver deep nourishment, visible rejuvenation and long-lasting hydration. Formulated with a high concentration of 600,000ppm Caviar Complex and PDRN, this advanced treatment helps strengthen the skin barrier, support natural regeneration and improve overall skin vitality, leaving the complexion looking plump, smooth and refreshed.Rich in skin-conditioning proteins and nutrients, Caviar Extract works to enhance elasticity, suppleness and radiance, while PDRN supports skin repair and resilience against external stressors. The innovative hydrogel mask gradually turns transparent as active ingredients are fully absorbed, ensuring optimal delivery for visibly revitalised skin.Directions of use: Apply the mask at the end of your skincare routine and leave it on overnight. Overnight - remove the mask the next morning after a good night's sleep. Daytime - after preparing the skin with toner or serum, apply the mask and leave it on for 3-4 hours or until it becomes transparent. Pro tip - use the eyes and mouth parts of the mask on the sides of the nose, under eyes, neck, or anywhere you want additional hydration and firming.

name: Some By Mi 30 Days Bye Bye Blackhead Miracle Green Tea-Tox Bubble Cleanser 120g
description: Some By Mi 30 Days Bye Bye Blackhead Miracle Green Tea-Tox Bubble Cleanser (120g) incorporates Green Tea Water, enriched with 16 Tea Extracts and Natural BHA, to deeply cleanse pores of blackheads and whiteheads, enhancing skin brightness. The cleanser's tannin content ensures pores remain clean and tight, establishing this as a premier low pH pore care solution.Featuring Real Green Tea and Natural BHA, the cleanser is adept at dissolving blackheads, where micro BHA bubbles tackle them head-on, and Konjac grain paired with Green Tea leaves gently exfoliate, ensuring thorough pore clearance. The result is not just purified skin but also a moisturised finish after every cleanse, promoting a balanced and radiant complexion.Directions of use: On a dry face, apply the cleanser evenly like a mask. Allow it to foam, then with a splash of water, massage gently before rinsing off with lukewarm water. Optional - pore care routine: Initially, let the cleanser dissolve blackheads for 3 minutes. Follow with a minute of gentle scrubbing for blackhead removal. Finish by allowing the cleanser to sit on the skin for 1 minute to tighten pores.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Essence: Snail Mucin 97% + Rice 100ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Essence: Snail Mucin 97% + Rice (100ml) is a skin-repairing formula designed to improve texture, hydration and radiance.Enriched with 97% Snail Secretion Filtrate, it soothes, hydrates and supports skin elasticity while helping to brighten and smooth the complexion. Rice Ferment Filtrate works in synergy to enhance luminosity, refine texture and provide deep hydration, leaving skin soft, supple and revitalised. Lightweight and fast-absorbing, this essence delivers powerful results without heaviness, making it suitable for daily use. Dermatologist tested for skin irritation. Cruelty-free.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, apply a moderate amount to the face and neck. Gently pat until fully absorbed.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cream: Snail Mucin 93% + Rice 100ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cream: Snail Mucin 93% + Rice (100ml) is a deeply hydrating formula that works to brighten, soothe and strengthen the skin barrier.Enriched with 93% Snail Secretion Filtrate and Rice Ferment Filtrate (Sake), it replenishes moisture, promotes radiance and calms irritation for a healthier-looking complexion. Panthenol supports collagen production to improve firmness, while Ectoin helps refine texture and repair the skin barrier for long-lasting resilience. With a rich gel-cream texture that absorbs quickly, this moisturiser delivers intensive care without heaviness or stickiness. Gentle and effective, it is free from common allergens, harsh alcohols, fragrances and artificial colourants, making it suitable for all skin types. Cruelty-free.Directions of use: Apply a moderate amount evenly to the skin as the last step of your skincare routine. Gently pat for better absorption.

name: Biodance Cera-Nol Gel Toner Pads x60
description: Biodance Cera-Nol Gel Toner Pads (x60) delivers intensive, multi-layered hydration while reinforcing the skin's natural barrier. Each bouncy, gel-type pad is soaked in a soothing essence formulated with D-Panthenol, 10-layered Hyaluronic Acid and 5-layered Ceramide to deeply moisturise, calm and strengthen sensitive or compromised skin. Enhanced with 10% glacial water for improved absorption and a cooling effect, the formula leaves the complexion feeling fresh, soft and balanced. Clinically tested with a skin irritation index of 0.00, these non-irritating pads are safe for daily use and ideal for dry, sensitive or dehydrated skin in need of lasting moisture and barrier support. Directions of use: After cleansing, gently swipe a pad across the face from the centre outward, avoiding the eye area. Pro Tip - apply pads to dry or dehydrated areas and leave on as a targeted mask treatment.

name: Arencia Fresh Royal Rosehip Mochi Cleanser 120g
description: Arencia Fresh Royal Rosehip Mochi Cleanser (120g) is a luxurious 2-in-1 mask and facial cleanser that hydrates, soothes and gently exfoliates in a single step.Enriched with Rosehip Extract, Pink Aloe Vera and Blue German Chamomile, it delivers antioxidant care while calming and nourishing the skin. Formulated using the ASDT method over 170 hours of grinding, rubbing and pressing, this cleanser features a dense, mochi-like texture that glides smoothly and comfortably across the face. Finely milled Almond Powder provides gentle exfoliation to refine skin texture without irritation. The result is clean, balanced and radiant skin that feels soft and revitalised. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Take an appropriate amount of the cleanser and add water to lather up. Gently massage on skin and rinse off with lukewarm water.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cleansing Oil: Pine Cica 1% + Probiotics 200ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cleansing Oil: Pine Cica 1% + Probiotics (200ml) is a gentle yet effective cleanser that removes impurities, makeup, blackheads and whiteheads while maintaining skin balance.Infused with a soothing Pine Cica Complex and skin-strengthening Probiotics, it calms irritation and supports the skin barrier during cleansing. A blend of five plant-based oils works to dissolve impurities without clogging pores, making it suitable for all skin types, including acne-prone skin. Dermatologist tested for skin irritation. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply an appropriate amount of cleansing oil to dry hands and massage evenly over the face. Add a small amount of water and continue massaging until the oil emulsifies into a milky texture. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.

name: Arencia Fresh Blue Hyssop Mochi Cleanser 120g
description: Arencia Fresh Blue Hyssop Mochi Cleanser (120g) is an all-in-one cleanser designed specifically for combination skin. Acting as a daily cleanser, face scrub and makeup remover, it streamlines your routine without compromising on effectiveness.Enriched with French Hyssop Extract, packed with Vitamin C and essential minerals, it works to smooth skin texture, eliminate blackheads and deliver a boost of lasting hydration. The unique patented rice cake texture provides a deep yet gentle cleanse while locking in moisture for a soft, supple finish. Gentle enough for sensitive skin, this cleanser transforms your skincare regimen into a simple, nourishing experience. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Take an appropriate amount of the cleanser and add water to lather up. Gently massage on skin and rinse off with lukewarm water.

name: Axis-Y Dark Spot Correcting Glow Toner 125ml
description: Axis-Y Dark Spot Correcting Glow Toner (125ml) is a spray toner enriched with Glutathione and Niacinamide, which works to reduce melanin production, revealing luminous, clear skin.Formulated with Vitamins B5 and B12, it provides deep hydration, leaving the skin soft and nourished. Its soft mist texture delivers a refreshing finish and a natural, dewy glow. The innovative dual-layer formula ensures moisturising and brightening ingredients penetrate deeply for maximum effectiveness. For best results, pair with the Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum and Cream. Gentle enough for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Shake well to mix the serum and toner layers. After cleansing or removing makeup, spray a proper amount onto face and tap gently for absorption.

name: Numbuzin No. 9 NAD+ Collagen Under Eye Patches 5 Pairs
description: Numbuzin No. 9 NAD+ Collagen Under Eye Patches (5 Pairs) are Collagen-infused hydrogel eye patches which revitalise tired under-eyes. Enriched with Niacinamide, they help brighten dark circles while Caffeine and Peptides work to nourish and depuff the delicate under-eye area.Infused with fast-absorbing 300 Da Collagen, the patches help plump fine lines and promote a youthful, radiant look. A cooling formula provides an instant refresh, softening the appearance of lines and reducing puffiness, while Fish Collagen, NAD+, and 50 peptides deliver intensive hydration and rejuvenation to mature or dull skin. Each patch adheres comfortably, offering a smooth, firming, and revitalised under-eye contour in just minutes, leaving the skin visibly brighter, plumper, and more youthful.Directions of use: Angle the thin end towards your eye corner or any concerned areas like lids, corners or smile lines. Leave it overnight and remove in the morning.

name: VT Cosmetics Mild Reedle Shot 50 50ml
description: VT Cosmetics Mild Reedle Shot 50 (50ml) is a translucent white physical derma delivery system containing circa 38,000 natural micro-needles which rejuvenates the skin by accelerating skin cell turnover to provide smoother, healthier skin.This spreadable laser treatment contains VT's proprietary Cica Reedle and Cicahyalon ingredients containing Silica, Centella Asiatica Extract, low molecular Triple Hyaluronic Acid, Centella 4X Complex and Green Propolis Extract to optimise hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. These key active ingredients are activated by the micro-needles so that they permeate the deeper layers of the skin, enhancing the condition of sensitive skin, promoting skin regeneration and restoring overall skin health. Whilst having a gentle action on the skin, this treatment offers a dual functionality, effectively brightening whilst minimising the appearance of wrinkles. Cruelty-free.Directions of use:For skin care in the evening, take an appropriate amount on a clean face and apply it gently with your fingers.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Water-Fit Sun Serum PA++++ SPF50+ 15ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Water-Fit Sun Serum PA++++ SPF50+ (15ml) is a high-protection chemical sunscreen formulated with Hyaluronic Acids, Centella Asiatica, and a soothing Baby Green Complex to defend and hydrate the skin simultaneously. Its ultra-lightweight, serum-like texture glides on effortlessly, providing a breathable, dewy finish without any white cast. Delivering the comfort of a moisturiser, it absorbs quickly while maintaining optimal hydration throughout the day.Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, this multi-functional formula offers brightening, anti-wrinkle, and UV-protective benefits. The reef-safe blend is free from marine-harmful ingredients, while 7 types of Sprout Extracts within the Baby Greens Complex calm and nourish stressed skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply evenly to areas exposed to UV rays as the final step in your skincare routine. Gently pat for enhanced absorption.

name: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Poreless Primer 10g
description: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Poreless Primer (10g) effectively blurs pores, controls excess sebum and balances moisture.Infused with powerful marine extracts and vegan PDRN derived from Spirulina, this primer smooths the skin's surface while absorbing sweat and oil thanks to its porous spherical powders. The Spirulina-based PDRN not only enhances skin elasticity and collagen synthesis but also soothes sensitive or irritated skin by creating a gentle protective barrier. Rich in amino acids and antioxidants, it strengthens the skin's natural defences, prevents moisture loss, and promotes a hydrated, resilient complexion. Unlike traditional animal-derived PDRN, this plant-based formula offers superior calming effects and faster absorption due to its lower molecular weight, ensuring a lightweight, clean, and vegan-friendly experience. The result is a flawless, shine-free finish that keeps your makeup looking fresh and comfortable all day long. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use:Gently apply in one direction on areas which require pore coverage and sebum control before applying makeup.

name: VT Cosmetics Mild Reedle Shot 50 2-Step Mask 25g
description: VT Cosmetics Mild Reedle Shot 50 2-Step Mask (25g) includes a sachet of VT Mild Reedle Shot 50 together with a synergising sheet mask to optimise the efficacy of the key active ingredients and facilitate deep skin recovery. VT Mild Reedle Shot 50 is a translucent white physical derma delivery system containing circa 38,000 natural micro needles which rejuvenate the skin by accelerating skin cell turnover to provide smoother, healthier skin. This spreadable laser treatment contains VT's proprietary Cica Reedle and Cicahyalon ingredients containing Silica, Centella Asiatica Extract, low molecular Triple Hyaluronic Acid, Centella 4X Complex and Green Propolis Extract to optimise hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. These key active ingredients are activated by the micro-needles so that they permeate the deeper layers of the skin, enhancing the condition of sensitive skin, promoting skin regeneration and restoring overall skin health. Whilst having a gentle action on the skin, this treatment offers dual functionality, effectively brightening whilst minimising the appearance of wrinkles. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Kit Contains: 1 x VT Cosmetics Vegan Mild Reedle Shot 50 (1.5g). 1 x VT Cosmetics Reedle Synergy Sheet Mask. Directions of use: For skin care in the evening, take an appropriate amount on a clean face and apply it gently with your fingers. Apply sheet mask immediately over face and leave to activate for 20 to 30 minutes.

name: Mixsoon Centella Sun Cream PA++++ SPF50+ 50g
description: Mixsoon Centella Sun Cream PA++++ SPF50+ (50g) shields skin from harmful UV rays while nurturing it with the multifaceted key ingredient, Centella Asiatica. The sun cream features a serum-like, lightweight formulation, making it a seamless addition across all seasons without burdening skin. As a chemical sunscreen, it blends smoothly into the skin without leaving a white residue, ensuring absorption without any stickiness. Centella Asiatica extract is key to this formula, providing soothing, balancing, and moisturising benefits while Glycerin aids hydration, ensuring skin stays healthy and radiant. It effectively reduces dry patches, skin irritations, and impurities, and regulates sebum production, making it ideal for those with sensitive or reddened skin. Cruelty-free. Directions of use: Ideal for daily use, apply the sun cream 30 minutes before sun exposure.

name: Arencia Holy Hyssop Serum 30 50g
description: Arencia Holy Hyssop Serum 30 (50g) is a lightweight, jelly-textured serum formulated to hydrate, brighten and smooth the complexion.Powered by 30% Vita ACE Complex and Green Hyssop Extract from France, it delivers a concentrated blend of Vitamins A, C and E to help refine texture, minimise the look of pores and restore radiance. Niacinamide supports a more even skin tone by targeting hyperpigmentation, while Hyaluronic Acid, Ceramide NP and Panthenol provide deep hydration and reinforce the skin barrier. The refreshing formula absorbs quickly, leaving skin soft, glossy and revitalised. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use:Apply an appropriate amount on clean face and gently pat to aid absorption.

name: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 30ml
description: VT Cosmetics Reedle Shot 700 (30ml) is a translucent white physical derma delivery system containing circa 570,000 natural micro-needles which rejuvenates the skin by accelerating skin cell turnover to provide smoother, healthier skin.This spreadable laser treatment contains VT's proprietary Cica Reedle and Cicahyalon ingredients containing Silica, Centella Asiatica Extract, low molecular Triple Hyaluronic Acid, Centella 4X Complex and Green Propolis Extract to exfoliate, treat acne, optimise hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. These key active ingredients are activated by the micro-needles so that they permeate the deeper layers of the skin, enhancing the condition of sensitive skin, promoting skin regeneration and restoring overall skin health. Whilst having a gentle action on the skin, this treatment offers dual functionality, effectively brightening whilst minimising the appearance of wrinkles. Cruelty-free.Directions of use:For skin care in the evening, take an appropriate amount on a clean face and apply it gently with your fingers.

name: D'Alba UV Essence Waterfull Tone-Up Colour Correcting Sun Cream SPF50+ 50ml
description: D'Alba UV Essence Waterfull Tone-Up Colour Correcting Sun Cream SPF50+ (50ml) is a 2-in-1 sun care, colour-correcting UV essence which shields the skin from UV rays while moisturising and revitalising with its light formulation. The signature key ingredient Trufferol comprises richly antioxidant Premium White Truffles carefully sourced from Piedmont in Italy which have been infused with Tocopherol (Vitamin E) to create an effect 6 times more effective than the renowned anti-inflammatory and antioxidant active Propolis. The glowy pink tone of the sunscreen brightens the skin tone, leaving the skin naturally radiant, moisturised and protected with its high SPF of 57.3.The combination of Panthenol, Centella Asiatica Extract, Aloe Vera Leaf Extract and Hydrolysed Hyaluronic Acid protects the skin while bringing a natural glow to the skin. The hybrid formulation provides both the gentle, safe protection of a physical sunscreen and the smooth texture of a chemical sunscreen, being lightweight and hydrating without leaving any residue. Dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Key Benefits: SPF50+ sun protection. Natural pink glow. Natural tone-up. Anti-ageing. Brightens fatigued dark spots. Leaves no white cast or stickiness. Works as a light primer/base. Provides 30-hour hydration. Directions of use: Apply a sufficient amount evenly all over the skin at the last step of your skincare. Perfect for use as a makeup base.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Sun: Pine Tree + Ceramide PA++++ SPF50+ 50ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Sun: Pine Tree + Ceramide PA++++ SPF50+ (50ml) is a soothing, protective sunscreen designed to defend the skin against harmful UVA and UVB rays.Formulated with four advanced chemical UV filters, it provides high-performance SPF50+ PA++++ protection without leaving a white cast. Enriched with Pine Tree Extract to calm redness, irritation and inflammation, and Ceramide to strengthen the skin barrier, it helps maintain a healthy, resilient complexion. The ultra-lightweight texture absorbs quickly into the skin, leaving a comfortable, glowy finish. Free from common allergens, harsh alcohols, parabens, sulphates and artificial colours. Dermatologist tested for sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: As the final step of your morning skincare routine, apply an appropriate amount to the face and neck. Gently massage until fully absorbed.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Niacinamide 10% Boosting Shot Ampoule 30ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Niacinamide 10% Boosting Shot Ampoule (30ml) is a radiance-boosting treatment designed to refine pores, even skin tone, and smooth texture. Featuring 10% Niacinamide, Centella Asiatica Extract, Panthenol, Tranexamic Acid, and Ascorbyl Glucoside, it targets dullness and discolouration while reinforcing the skin barrier. The advanced Boosting Shot system uses micro-sized spicules, smaller than the average pore, to enhance absorption and deliver actives deep into the skin for maximum effectiveness.Clinically proven to reduce pore size, depth, and count within four weeks, this lightweight, non-sticky ampoule instantly brightens the complexion and promotes triple tone correction in two weeks. Ideal for oily, combination, and uneven skin types, it leaves skin hydrated, refined, and visibly more luminous. Hypoallergenic, gentle, and suitable for sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, use the dropper to apply an appropriate amount to the face. Follow the skin's natural texture and gently pat to aid absorption.

name: Some By Mi Retinol Bakuchiol Dual Cream 50ml
description: Some By Mi Retinol Bakuchiol Dual Cream (50ml) is a clinically balanced daily treatment designed to target multiple skin concerns, improving texture, elasticity and pore visibility through the synergistic effects of two concentrated formulas.Featuring a dual-chamber design, one side delivers Retinol and Retinal to smooth fine lines and accelerate cell turnover, while the other side provides Bakuchiol for gentle yet powerful antioxidant and firming benefits. The combination of Retinol (200ppm), Retinal (1ppm) and Bakuchiol (5000ppm) supports youthful resilience, clarity and a refined complexion without irritation. Its lightweight, creamy texture absorbs quickly, making it ideal for both retinol beginners and seasoned users seeking smoother, more even-toned skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Before use, tap the tube 2-3 times to ensure even distribution of product. Press the 'Press Here' area to dispense both creams simultaneously. Mix gently and apply evenly over the face, avoiding the eye and lip areas. Use in your evening routine and follow with sunscreen the next morning.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Cloudy Mist 120ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Cloudy Mist (120ml) is a lightweight, ultra-fine facial mist that delivers instant hydration and comfort to dry or sensitive skin. Formulated with the brand's signature Hyalu-Cica blend, it combines Hyaluronic Acid for deep moisture with Centella Asiatica extract to calm irritation and strengthen the skin barrier. Enriched with 40% Green Tea Water, it provides antioxidant protection against environmental stress while leaving the skin refreshed and balanced.Infused with Vitamin A, Vitamin C, amino acids, and Ceramide Biome, this mist supports elasticity, promotes a plumper texture, and helps reduce the appearance of fine lines. The fine spray distributes evenly for a smooth, dewy glow that lasts throughout the day. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Hold 20 to 30cm away from the face and spray once or twice. Allow to absorb fully before applying additional skincare or makeup.

name: Some By Mi V10 Hyal Lip Sun Protector SPF15 7ml
description: Some By Mi V10 Hyal Lip Sun Protector SPF15 (7ml) is an ultra-nourishing daily lip balm that protects lips from UV damage and prevents fine lines and wrinkles, while Shea Butter and Olive Oil rejuvenate delicate lips.The soft and rich balm-type formula melts onto lips to shield them from UV rays and daily irritations, it is formulated with Tocopheryl Acetate, a Vitamin E derivative, and improves the appearance of wrinkles on the lips. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply to lips after SPF for sun care. Reapply whenever lips feel dry or chapped.

name: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cleansing Foam: Pine Cica 1% + Probiotics 150ml
description: K-Secret Seoul 1988 Cleansing Foam: Pine Cica 1% + Probiotics (150ml) is a soothing daily cleanser that lifts away impurities while caring for sensitive and acne-prone skin.Enriched with 1% Pine Cica Complex and Bifida Ferment Lysate, it works to calm irritation, reinforce the skin barrier and leave the complexion comfortable after cleansing. Added Salicylic Acid gently exfoliates to remove dead skin cells, blackheads and whiteheads, helping to reveal clearer, smoother and more radiant skin. Dermatologist tested for skin irritation. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply an appropriate amount of cleansing foam to a wet face. Gently massage over the skin to create a lather. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.

name: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Soothing Repair Serum 50ml
description: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Soothing Repair Serum (50ml) is a luxurious, lightweight formula designed to calm redness, firm, and deeply hydrate the skin. Infused with 1% Spirulina-derived PDRN and marine amino acids, it works to strengthen the skin barrier and soothe sensitive, irritated skin.The combination of dual peptides and marine mucin tightens pores, improves elasticity, and visibly firms the complexion, while soothing blue capsules provide gentle brightening and anti-wrinkle benefits without any added fragrance. Unlike traditional animal-derived PDRN, this serum uses vegan-certified Spirulina PDRN, which offers superior calming and collagen-boosting effects thanks to its lower molecular weight and plant-based extraction process. Rich in antioxidants and amino acids, Spirulina also protects against moisture loss, enhancing skin resilience and hydration. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After prepping your skin with toner, take an appropriate amount of serum and gently spread all over the face. Gently tap for absorption.

name: Some By Mi AHA, BHA, PHA Miracle Toner 30ml
description: Some By Mi 30 Days AHA, BHA, PHA Miracle Toner (30ml) incorporates natural Tea Tree Extract with a potent blend of AHA, BHA, and PHA to exfoliate, purify, and revitalise skin. This toner is designed to leave the skin clearer and more radiant than ever before. Its low pH formulation is gentle enough for all skin types, including those with sensitive and acne-prone skin.Infused with Tea Tree Extract that tackles acne while the AHA component works to remove dead skin cells, BHA targets wastes and sebum accumulated in pores, and PHA prevents skin moisture loss while dissolving dead skin. Within just 30 days of use, this toner can transform your skin, ensuring your skin remains hydrated and healthy.Directions of use: After cleansing, soak a cotton pad with the toner and gently wipe across the face. Gently pat the skin to enhance absorption.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica First Ampoule 50ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica First Ampoule (50ml) is a hydrating ampoule packed with a robust 90% concentration of Hyalu-Cica formula, uniting Hyaluronic Acid and Centella Asiatica to soothe and moisturise the skin effectively. Complementing these are Betula Platyphylla Japonica Juice and Anastatica Hierochuntica Extract, which further hydrate and calm the skin with their anti-inflammatory properties, ensuring nutrients are absorbed deeply. The ampoule's watery and fluid texture allows for straightforward application and swift absorption, making it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: Dispense an appropriate amount and apply evenly across the skin. Gently pat into the skin to promote absorption.

name: Arencia Fresh Red Smoothie Serum 30 50g
description: Arencia Fresh Red Smoothie Serum 30 (50g) is a rejuvenating serum formulated with powerful anti-ageing ingredients, including Collagen, Roselle Extract and Peptides, to restore firmness and revive a plump, youthful look.Its smooth, jelly-like texture melts into the skin, delivering Niacinamide, Ginseng Berry, Tocopherol and Rosehip Extract to soothe, revitalise and deeply nourish. With 30% Red Collagen Complex, it works to enhance elasticity, boost Collagen production, and refine the overall complexion. Rosehip Extract, rich in Vitamin C, brightens dull skin, while Hibiscus Extract provides antioxidant protection, and Niacinamide helps reduce inflammation and the appearance of pores. The lightweight formula sinks in effortlessly, offering hydration that lasts through the night and revealing a dewy, supple glow by morning. Designed to smooth fine lines, improve clarity and promote a healthy, radiant finish, this serum is an essential step for achieving firmer, more luminous skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Daily Care - use in the morning and evening as part of the daily skincare routine. Apply an appropriate amount and gently pat for better absorption. Night Care - apply a thick layer at night as a sleeping mask.

name: Some By Mi Retinol Bakuchiol Bubble Toner 100ml
description: Some By Mi Retinol Bakuchiol Bubble Toner (100ml) is a gentle yet effective first-step toner formulated to refine texture, minimise pores and help fade blemish marks while delivering deep hydration.The innovative bubble formula transforms into ultra-fine microbubbles that penetrate the skin's surface, evenly distributing active ingredients for maximum absorption. A balanced blend of Retinol, Retinal and plant-derived Bakuchiol works to promote smoother, clearer and more youthful-looking skin, while Hyaluronic Acid provides long-lasting moisture retention. Perfect for sensitive or beginner retinoid users, it helps prep and condition the skin for the rest of your routine. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Dispense an appropriate amount onto your palm. Gently pat into cleansed skin until fully absorbed. Use as the first step of your skincare routine, morning or evening. When used during the day, follow with sunscreen.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Gentle Cleansing Milk 200ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Gentle Cleansing Milk (200ml) is a highly nourishing cleansing milk which gently melts away makeup, dirt, and impurities while preserving the skin's natural moisture balance.Enriched with barrier-strengthening ingredients like Ceramide, Peptides, and Vitamin E, it helps maintain a plump, hydrated complexion and supports long-term skin health. The soothing blend of Centella Asiatica, Panthenol, and Beta-Glucan calms sensitivity and replenishes hydration, leaving skin feeling soft and refreshed without any tightness or dryness. Its mild acidic formula respects your skin's natural pH, ensuring a healthy barrier after every cleanse. With its silky, milky texture that glides effortlessly across the skin, this gentle, non-irritating cleanser provides a moisturising finish that comforts even the most delicate complexions. Perfect for sensitive, dry, or normal skin, it delivers a clean, supple, and healthy-looking glow with every use. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Apply a proper amount on skin and gently massage. Rinse with lukewarm water afterwards.

name: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Soothing Sherbet Mask 10 x 1g
description: Some By Mi PDRN Spirulina Soothing Sherbet Mask (10 x 1g) is a vegan wash-off face mask which cools your skin by an impressive 10.9°C in just 10 minutes. Formulated with a unique blend of Marine PDRN derived from Spirulina and 10 powerful seaweed extracts, this mask instantly soothes, hydrates, and calms heat and damage-stressed skin.Its gentle PHA exfoliation smooths skin texture while delivering deep nourishment, leaving your complexion revitalised and balanced. The fragrance-free, light teal powder transforms into a soft sherbet-like texture upon contact with water, providing a delicate yet effective daily soothing treatment. Powered by vegan-certified Spirulina PDRN, this mask promotes skin regeneration by enhancing elasticity and collagen synthesis more effectively than traditional animal-derived PDRN. Rich in amino acids and antioxidants, Spirulina helps strengthen the skin barrier, prevent moisture loss, and maintain hydration for resilient, healthy skin. Its plant-based, ethically sourced formula offers superior calming and collagen-boosting benefits with faster absorption and gentler care, making it ideal for sensitive and irritated skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Use 1-2 times a week or whenever your skin needs calming care. Pour water up to the inner line of the container (about 45 ml). Add one packet of powder and mix with the spatula until it forms a sherbet-like texture. Apply evenly to the face and leave on for 10 minutes. Gently remove the mask with the wide side of the spatula and rinse off any residue with water.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Sunsational Kit
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Sunsational Kit is a curated collection of Skin1004 products which provide effective UVA/UVB sunscreen protection whilst soothing and hydrating the skin.Collection Contains: 2 x Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Water-Fit Sun Serum PA++++ SPF50+ (15ml) - a chemical sunscreen that offers high-grade UVA/UVB protection, featuring a unique blend of Hyaluronic Acids and Cica (Centella Asiatica) in its formula, alongside a Baby Green Complex. This ultra-lightweight sunscreen stands out with its serum-like texture that ensures breathability and a dewy finish without leaving a white cast. It challenges the common drawbacks of traditional sunscreens by providing a moisturiser-like feel, ensuring smooth application and rapid absorption. Specifically designed for all skin types, including sensitive skin, its innovative formula offers deep moisturisation and a soothing effect, boasting properties for brightening, wrinkle reduction, and UV protection. The sunscreen excludes ingredients harmful to marine ecosystems while the addition of a naturally derived Baby Greens Complex, consisting of 7 types of sprout extracts, further soothes the skin. Reef-safe. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. 1 x Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Hyalu-Cica Silky-Fit Sun Stick PA++++ SPF50+ (20g) - a convenient, portable sun care solution incorporating the signature Hyalu-Cica formula, which combines Hyaluronic Acids with Centella Asiatica for deep moisturisation and a soothing effect that absorbs quickly into the skin. Formulated as a roll-on stick, this sun stick offers a breathable and dewy finish without leaving a white cast, perfect for on-the-go application. It has been tested and proven to be sweat-proof and sebum-resistant, making it an ideal sun protection for outdoor activities. This reef-safe product is made without harmful ingredients to the marine ecosystem. Botanical Tannins are included to address pores and sebum, promoting flawless skin. The formula is also verified through skin irritation tests to be safe for sensitive skin and all skin types. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly. Directions of use: Sun Serum - as the last step of skincare, apply evenly to areas exposed to UV rays. Gently pat for better absorption. Sun Stick - as the final step in your skincare routine, apply evenly to areas exposed to UV rays.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizing Velvet Finish Sunscreen PA++++ SPF50+ 50ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizing Velvet Finish Sunscreen PA++++ SPF50+ (50ml) is a tinted hybrid sunscreen that delivers high-level daily protection while creating a smooth, soft-focus base. Formulated with SPF50+ to shield against UVA and UVB rays, it features a natural beige tint that helps even tone, blur the look of pores and refine uneven texture without leaving a white cast.The lightweight, airy formula glides on comfortably and sets to a soft-matte velvet finish that feels fresh and non-greasy throughout the day. Madagascar Centella Asiatica helps calm sensitive skin, while a pore-refining complex works to create a smoother appearance. Aloe Vera Extract adds hydration and comfort, and Sunflower Seed Oil supports a seamless application. Oil-absorbing spherical powders help control shine for extended wear, making it ideal both alone and under makeup. Hypoallergenic and free from fragrance, parabens and sulphates. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: As the final step of your skincare routine, apply a generous amount to the face and neck. Reapply every 2 hours during prolonged sun exposure.

name: Biodance Skin Refining Mild PHA Toner 150ml
description: Biodance Skin Refining Mild PHA Toner (150ml) is a gentle exfoliating treatment developed specifically for sensitive skin. Designed to refine texture with minimal irritation, it supports smooth, radiant skin through controlled and effective renewal.Formulated with 8% PHA, a next-generation exfoliant with a larger molecular size than traditional AHA or BHA, it targets surface-level dead skin cells while helping to maintain comfort and balance. A blend of five-layer Ceramides, Natural Moisturising Factors (NMF) and Fatty Acids works to reinforce the skin barrier, prevent moisture loss and support long-lasting hydration. The result is softer, more refined skin with a dewy, revitalised finish. All Biodance formulas are created with non-toxic, non-irritant ingredients and are free from allergens and 19 harsh ingredients.Directions of use: Soak a cotton pad with toner and gently swipe across the face and neck, or pour into your hands and pat directly onto the skin for absorption. For enhanced care, place soaked cotton pads onto the skin for 3-5 minutes before removing.

name: Biodance Micro Dual Serum Toner 150ml
description: Biodance Micro Dual Serum Toner (150ml) is a moisturising and nourishing tonic designed to deliver deep hydration across all skin types. Created to support long-lasting moisture retention, it helps revitalise and refresh while preparing the skin for the next steps in your routine.Formulated with 3% Grapeseed Oil and 97% serum water, this innovative dual-phase blend balances nourishment and hydration in one lightweight step. The micro serum technology allows moisture to penetrate deeply, helping to prevent water loss even in dry environments. By supporting the skin's oil and water equilibrium, it strengthens the barrier and promotes a more resilient, supple-looking complexion. All Biodance formulas are developed with non-toxic, non-irritant ingredients and are free from allergens and 19 harsh ingredients.Directions of use: After cleansing morning and evening, apply an appropriate amount to your hands. Distribute evenly across the face and gently pat for absorption.

name: Biodance First Synergy Toner 150ml
description: Biodance First Synergy Toner (150ml) is a hydrating, balancing formula created to support the skin's natural barrier while restoring optimal pH levels. With 96% hydrating ingredients and a concentrated, serum-like texture, it delivers lasting moisture with just a small amount, preparing the skin perfectly for the rest of your routine.Formulated at a skin-friendly pH 5.5, it helps replenish moisture and comfort dry, fragile skin. Panthenol provides a soothing, calming effect, while a blend of 10 types of Hyaluronic Acid and Betaine works to deliver deep, multi-layered hydration. The 5-Calming Complex further supports sensitive skin, helping to protect and rebalance. Hypoallergenic and free from 19 harsh and controversial ingredients, it is developed with safe, non-toxic and non-irritant components suitable for even delicate skin types.Directions of use: Soak a cotton pad with toner and gently swipe across the face and neck, or pour into your hands and pat directly onto the skin for absorption. For enhanced care, place soaked cotton pads onto the skin for 3-5 minutes before removing.

name: Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Gel Mask Pack 4 x 28ml
description: Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Gel Mask Pack (4 x 28ml) is a deeply hydrating gel sheet mask designed to improve elasticity, smooth texture and reduce the appearance of fine lines. Infused with elasticity-boosting Salmon PDRN, Hydrolysed Collagen and multi-peptides, it visibly firms and revitalises tired skin while delivering an instant cooling sensation.The soft hydrogel sheet adheres closely to the skin to enhance ingredient absorption and deliver long-lasting moisture. Clinically tested to help improve wrinkle depth and brightness, it supports skin barrier repair and visibly boosts radiance. A single mask provides a cooling effect of up to 7.9°C and maintains skin elasticity for up to 48 hours. Hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin.Directions of use: After cleansing, apply the mask evenly across the face, avoiding the eye and lip areas. Leave on for 1-3 hours, then gently remove. Pat any remaining essence into the skin to aid absorption.

name: Haruharu Wonder Black Rice Probiotics Barrier Essence 120ml
description: Haruharu Wonder Black Rice Probiotics Barrier Essence (120ml) is a restorative essence formulated to hydrate, strengthen and plump the skin while supporting overall barrier health.The formula is enriched with a blend of five Ceramides and five Fatty Acids that work together to reinforce resilience and restore balance for a smoother, healthier-looking complexion. Phytosterols and cholesterol improve moisture retention, leaving skin supple and firm, while Galactomyces Ferment Filtrate, a probiotic-rich ingredient, boosts elasticity and replenishes hydration. To calm and protect, antioxidant-rich upcycled Black Rice Extract soothes and strengthens, making this essence both effective and gentle. The creamy, milky texture absorbs effortlessly, delivering deep hydration without heaviness or stickiness, leaving skin soft, refreshed and radiant. Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types, it is free from GMOs, silicones and drying alcohol. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: Shake well before use. Apply a moderate amount onto hands and gently massage into face and neck. Lightly pat to encourage absorption.

name: CosRx The Peptide Collagen Hydrogel Eye Patches 30 Pairs
description: CosRx The Peptide Collagen Hydrogel Eye Patches (30 Pairs) are designed to refresh and revitalise the under-eye area with a blend of four Peptides and Collagen. They help reduce puffiness while delivering targeted hydration to support a smoother, more energised appearance.The formula works to soften the look of fine lines and wrinkles, improve firmness and ease visible dark circles. Its soothing hydrogel texture provides calming care for dull or dry skin, making the eye area appear brighter and more awake. Cruelty-free.Directions of use: Apply to clean, dry skin and leave on for around 10 minutes. Remove the patches and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin. For puffiness and wrinkles, position the larger rounded end toward the nose. For crow's feet, position the larger rounded end away from the nose.

name: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Matrixyl 10% Boosting Shot Ampoule 30ml
description: Skin1004 Madagascar Centella Matrixyl 10% Boosting Shot Ampoule (30ml) is an intensive hydrating and firming treatment designed to revitalise the skin and improve elasticity. Formulated with 10% Matrixyl 3000® and Hyaluronic Acid, it delivers deep, lasting moisture while visibly plumping and smoothing the complexion. Madagascar Centella Asiatica Extract, Panthenol, and Volufiline 5% work together to strengthen the skin barrier, enhance firmness, and restore a youthful, resilient appearance.Using Hydrolysed Sponge Spicules smaller than the average pore, this ampoule's three-step delivery system allows potent actives to penetrate deeply for maximum effectiveness. Clinically proven to improve hydration and suppleness after a single use, it maintains long-term moisture balance and reinforces skin structure over time. Hypoallergenic, gentle, and suitable for dry, mature, and sensitive skin. Cruelty-free & vegan-friendly.Directions of use: After cleansing and toning, use the dropper to apply an appropriate amount to the face. Follow the skin's natural texture and gently pat to aid absorption.
